# latexmkrc

- Place .latexmkrc in \~/.latexmkrc

``` default
# Generate pdf using pdflatex (-pdf)
$pdf_mode=1;

# Use bibtex if a .bib file exists
$bibtex_use=1;

# Define command to compile with pdfsync support and nonstopmode
$pdflatex= 'pdflatex -synctex=1 --interaction=nonstopmode -file-line-error';

# Continous compiling
$preview_continuous_mode=1;
```

- The following .latexmkrc works perfectly with Ubuntu OS while using evince as a pdf reader

```default
# ~/.latexmkrc

# Generate PDF
$pdf_mode = 1;

# Use BibTeX when needed
$bibtex_use = 1;

# pdflatex command
$pdflatex = 'pdflatex %O -synctex=1 -interaction=nonstopmode -file-line-error %S';

# Continuous compilation (effective when latexmk is run with -pvc)
$preview_continuous_mode = 1;

# PDF viewer
$pdf_previewer = 'evince';

# Common auxiliary files to clean
$clean_ext = 'acn acr alg aux bbl bcf blg fdb_latexmk fls glg glo gls idx ilg ind ist lof log lot out run.xml synctex.gz toc';
```
